videos.title: 4K Japan Walk Tour with Relaxing ASMR Wave Sound in Aoshima Shrine Miyazaki - Sea with Rain Forest
videos.description:
Enjoy a guided walking tour on Aoshima Island in Miyazaki, Japan, where we visit the unique sea, Aoshima Shrine, subtropical rain forest and the local botanical garden area! Miyazaki is located in the Southern part of Honshu (mainland) in Japan and is known for its sunny weather and subtropical atmosphere. In this walking POV video, you can hear the ASMR sound of for example waves and cicada shrilling, which is typical for Japanese summer.
